ham.subject: Your Amazon Order #1234567890 is Confirmed!
ham.body:
Dear Customer,

Thank you for shopping with Amazon! We are pleased to confirm your order.

Order Details:
Order ID: 1234567890
Order Total: $89.99
Shipping Address: 123 Elm Street, Springfield, IL 62704
Estimated Delivery: 3-5 business days

Items:
- UltraSoft Pillow – $29.99
- Wireless Mouse – $19.99
- 32GB USB Flash Drive – $10.99
- Bluetooth Headphones – $29.99

Payment Method: Visa ending in 1234

If you need to modify or cancel your order, please contact us within 24 hours. Otherwise, we will ship your items shortly.

Thank you for choosing Amazon.

Best regards,
Amazon Customer Service

spam.subject: Urgent: Immediate Action Required – Ticket #987654321
spam.body:
Hi [Your Name],

We have detected unusual activity on your corporate account. As part of our compliance protocol, we need to verify your login credentials. Please click the link below to confirm your identity and reset your password.

<URL>

Failure to act within 24 hours will result in temporary suspension of your access to corporate resources.

Thank you,
IT Helpdesk Team
